'''Lucross Collections''' was a collections agency that was known for its overzealous employees. The company was based on the [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="GG11" /> of [[Wodenstam]], located in the [[Skine sector/Legends|Skine sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The agency was a division of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]] responsible for [[loan shark]]ing and [[Currency/Legends|money]]-laundering operations.<ref name="GG11" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]''
